mapper.select: SELECT id FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{categoryId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND id = #{cityId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId} AND id = #{areaId} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM category WHERE region = #{region} AND id IN #{id} ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM city WHERE region = #{region} AND id IN #{id} ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE
SELECT id FROM area WHERE region = #{region} AND id IN #{id} ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE
